title: Nixing the Kube Config
summary: For a few years I had all my shit hosted on a multi node Kubernetes (K8S) cluster, which I put on Hetzner Cloud. Even wrote a guide about it, although at the time of writing it isn't back online. None of this is high stakes enough for me to care about uptime, really, so it just h
